understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on a grid-based level. The player must navigate obstacles and use gravity-based falling after horizontal moves to land on the goal while avoiding spikes (`u`/`v`) that end the run immediately.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT to change x-position, then gravity automatically pulls the player vertically (toward lower y if DOWN, higher y if UP) until landing on a solid tile. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) at a target position. Gravity direction determines fall path after each horizontal move. Levels have 50 turn limits per attempt, 2 attempts per level; failure restarts the level. UNDO reverts the last action for recovery.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on a grid-based level. The player must navigate obstacles and use gravity-based falling after horizontal moves to land on the goal while avoiding spikes (`u`/`v`) that end the run immediately.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT to change x-position, then gravity automatically pulls the player vertically (toward lower y if DOWN, higher y if UP) until landing on a solid tile. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) at a target position. Gravity direction determines fall path after each horizontal move. Levels have 50 turn limits per attempt, 2 attempts per level; failure restarts the level. UNDO reverts the last action for recovery.
